- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve system latency by 15%.
* Optimize database queries for faster response times.
* Implement code refactoring to enhance overall performance.
## Q2 Goals
* Implement new user authentication module.
* Develop real-time analytics dashboard.
* Integrate third-party payment gateway.
